descriptionEN: Functions as an input storage system for workpieces.
Uses pneumatic cylinders and sensors to separate and make workpieces available at the pickup position.
Picks and places workpieces between the stack, stamp, and sorting conveyor.
Adjusts the crane's behavior based on the workpiece's weight, color, and material type.
Applies variable pressure based on the weight category of the workpiece (light, medium, or heavy).
Organizes and stores workpieces into different ramps based on sorting rules.
Feeds WPs one-by-one to the SSC for further sorting
Stops incoming WPs until three are buffered
Organizes and stores workpieces into different ramps based on sorting rules.
Transports workpieces either to the ramp or to the RC
Re-feeds workpieces back to the Large Sorting Conveyor
Handles workpieces over the conveyor system with linear movement
